scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared -w packages/engine -w apps/api -w apps/web -w packages/cli -w apps/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared -w packages/engine -w apps/api -w apps/web -w packages/cli
scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared -w packages/engine -w apps/api && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.desktop:app: npm run build -w packages/shared -w packages/engine -w apps/api -w apps/web && npm run start -w apps/desktop
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build && npm run pack:dir -w apps/desktop
scripts.desktop:installer: npm run build && npm run dist -w apps/desktop
scripts.desktop:mac: npm run build && npm run dist:mac -w apps/desktop
scripts.desktop:linux: npm run build && npm run dist:linux -w apps/desktop
